title: HTTP Client Reuse, Retrieval, Redirects, Validators, and Bounded Bodies · Transfer Build
summary: An independent site owner provides a different origin, URL space, markup fault, indexing policy, accessibility need, resource budget, dynamic boundary, and failure condition and transfers http client reuse, retrieval, redirects, validators, and bounded bodies into a changed bounded HTTP page-fetch contract. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded HTTP page-fetch contract with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theo…
objectives: Reuse one configured client or bounded pool and close it deliberately so connection, proxy, TLS, cookie, and resource ownership are visible.
Use safe retrieval methods and an honest User-Agent, Accept, Accept-Encoding, conditional, and contact policy without impersonation.
Classify transport, status, media type, length, content coding, and domain outcomes before parsing the representation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Bounded Streaming
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-bounded-streaming-1y8ass" that uses case 7946 to validate client ownership, response admission, redirect revalidation, bounded streaming, and cleanup. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-bounded-streaming-1y8ass
# Competency: scraper-bounded-streaming.
# Case 7946: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: personal data must remain minimized and redacted.
# Changed case: replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget.
def evidence_scraper_bounded_streaming_1y8ass(responses: int = 12, admitted_html: int = 8, rejected_bodies: int = 4, redirect_hops: int = 3, leaked_clients: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1y8ass = "1y8ass-ssa8y1-7946"
    assert evidence_variant_1y8ass
    evidence_axes_1y8ass = (
        "authorization1y8ass",
        "url7946",
        "responsessa8y1",
        "tree1y8ass7946",
        "frontier79461y8ass",
        "reportssa8y17946",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1y8ass)) == 6
    if responses < 1 or admitted_html < 0 or rejected_bodies < 0:
        return False, responses, "response-count"
    if admitted_html + rejected_bodies != responses:
        return False, admitted_html, "admission-reconciliation"
    if redirect_hops < 0 or redirect_hops > 5:
        return False, redirect_hops, "redirect-budget"
    if leaked_clients > 0:
        return False, leaked_clients, "client-cleanup"
    assert admitted_html + rejected_bodies == responses and leaked_clients == 0
    return True, admitted_html, "bounded-page-fetch"
